notes: Schema version 1.256.3 adds the RTG math-solver adapter layer.
The adapter builds solver-run manifests consumable by GCAT-BCAT-Engine/workflows/math-solver.
The bridge exports solver cases; the adapter groups those cases into a solver-run contract.
Canonical fixture smoke command remains python tests/test_rtg_fixtures.py.
